# QA AI Command Library

This folder contains reusable AI prompts and commands for:
- API automation
- framework generation
- test reviews
- security validation
- reporting
- workflow validation
- RTM generation
- bug reporting

Usage:
Copy commands into GitHub Copilot Chat inside VS Code.

Guidelines:
- Use short modular prompts.
- Generate module-by-module.
- Reuse framework utilities.
- Follow token optimization rules.
